user.title: Nice Blinds Controller Setup
user.description: Configure your Nice blinds controller via HTTP

data_description.protocol_type: Connect to your Nice network controller

http_connection.title: Connect to Nice Controller
http_connection.description: Enter your Nice HTTP controller connection details

data_description.http_base_url: The IP address or hostname of your Nice controller (e.g., http://192.168.1.100)

select_devices.title: Select Devices
select_devices.description: Choose which blinds to add to Home Assistant

data_description.devices: Select one or more devices to control
data_description.move_time: Time it takes for blinds to fully open/close

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the controller. Check the URL and network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your username and password.
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Must start with http:// or https://
error.invalid_gpio_pin: Invalid GPIO pin (must be between 1 and 27)
error.no_devices_found: No devices found on the controller. Check your controller configuration.
error.select_at_least_one: Please select at least one device

abort.protocol_not_implemented: This protocol type is not yet implemented
